news.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
news.summary: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

news.title: ASML jumps over 7% after hiking sales forecast for second time this year on strong AI chip demand
news.summary: ASML on Wednesday raised its guidance for a second time this year as its customers continue to ramp up their production capacity of AI chips.

news.title: Oil rises after another round of U.S. strikes against Iran, naval blockade of the country's ports
news.summary: Oil prices rose Wednesday after U.S. forces struck Tehran and Washington reinstated its naval blockade of Iranian ports near the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: U.S. strikes Iranian missile sites, defense systems and reinstates port blockade
news.summary: President Donald Trump has said the U.S.-Iran ceasefire is over following multiple flare-ups of hostilities in the region.

news.title: China posts slowest quarterly growth since 2022 as investment slumps, fanning stimulus calls
news.summary: That second-quarter growth came below Beijing's full-year growth target range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal in decades.

news.title: Why Europe is suddenly betting big on drones
news.summary: Drones and autonomous systems are moving from niche battlefield tools to a core part of modern warfare.

news.title: Stripe, Advent offer to buy PayPal for more than $53 billion: Reuters
news.summary: Stripe and Advent International have made a joint offer to acquire PayPal Holdings Inc for $60.50 per share, in a deal that would value the payments company at more than $53 billion.

news.title: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq Futures Edge Higher On Cooling Inflation Signs, Strong Big Bank Earnings: IBM, APLD, SKYH, NBIS in Focus
news.summary: According to data from the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS), the Consumer Price Index (CPI) for June rose 3.5% year-on-year, below market expectations.

news.title: SK Hynix South Korean shares jump 11% as Asia tech stocks rally
news.summary: SK Hynix led a broad rally in Asian technology shares on Wednesday, tracking a rebound in U.S. semiconductor shares after a sharp selloff earlier this week.

news.title: Brace for $4 gas again: How U.S.-Iran tensions are threatening to end the price break at the pump
news.summary: Americans got some relief at the gas pump in recent weeks, enough to slow down inflation. That might not last long as the U.S. and Iran continue to vie for control of the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
news.summary: Stocks closed higher on Tuesday, helped by signs of easing inflation, which boosted investor hopes that the Federal Reserve can hold off on rate hikes for the moment.

news.title: Yum's Taco Bell removes select items, says no confirmed link to U.S. cyclosporiasis outbreak
news.summary: Yum Brands' Taco Bell said on Tuesday it had removed limited items from some restaurants as a precaution but said U.S. health officials have not linked the widening outbreak of cyclosporiasis to the chain or any specific food product.

news.title: Jim Cramer says concerns about AI market froth are overblown. Here's why

news.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?

news.title: Elon Musk likely broke the law by giving voters $1 million, Wisconsin board says
news.summary: Elon Musk likely broke Wisconsin law when he handed out $1 million checks to voters in the 2025 state Supreme Court election, a bipartisan panel found.
